candidate_check.description: The Kubernetes API Server audit log path must be set.

check_content_excerpt:
Change to the /etc/kubernetes/manifests/ directory on the Kubernetes Control Plane. Run the command:
grep -i audit-log-path * 

If the setting audit-log-path is not set in the Kubernetes API Server manifest file or it is not set to a valid path, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Edit the Kubernetes API Server manifest file in the /etc/kubernetes/manifests directory on the Kubernetes Control Plane. Set the value of "--audit-log-path" to valid location.
title: The Kubernetes API Server audit log path must be set.
